creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
An update to 3.0.4 was committed December 10th, but between the patch being written (march) and committed (december), net/asio was updated (november) in an incompatible way. That's the build failure that Marco started seeing. A fix for that has been committed now.

Closing as "overcome" even if it was roughly the original patch that was committed and later fixed.
